    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    IMessageBus.createTopic(TopicType topic)
    Creates a new topic on the message bus if it does not already exist.
    void
    IMessageBus.subscribe(String nodeId, TopicType topic, Consumer<Message<?>> handler)
    Subscribes a component to a topic so that it receives all messages published to that topic.
    void
    MessageBus.subscribe(String nodeId, TopicType topic)
    Subscribes a node to a topic.
    void
    IMessageBus.unsubscribe(String nodeId, TopicType topic)
    Unsubscribes a component from a topic.
    void
    MessageBus.unsubscribe(String nodeId, TopicType topic)
    Unsubscribes a node from a topic.
